summary: Platform Features Testing - 6 Features (Public Audit Trail, Multi-Signature, Certificate Expiration, Ceremony Replay, Document Versioning). Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 new pages verified working. Fixed 2 bugs during testing.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: start_ceremony endpoint not setting initiated_by field due to missing Request type hint
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed 'request=None' to 'request: Request = None' to enable FastAPI dependency injection

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: ceremony-replay endpoint crashing with NoneType error when blockchain_seal or consensus is None
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added 'or {}' fallback for agents, consensus, seal variables in get_ceremony_replay and _calc_duration functions

seed_data_creation: Created test ceremonies and multi-sig ceremonies during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Features (6 features) fully tested. Public Audit Trail is PUBLIC (no auth). Multi-Signature, Certificate Expiration, Ceremony Replay require auth. All backend APIs working. Frontend pages have proper data-testid attributes.
